summary: READ-ONLY Demo Clarity Audit of LP-native demo path (estimate 8f95c9c2). No code changed, no data mutated, no emails sent, no accept confirms, no field-verify clicks, no appendage dims saved. Screenshots captured at 1920x900 + 1366x768 for editor / AI Measure modal / 3D tab / material list / customer quote preview, and 1920x900 + 1366x768 + 390x844 for public Accept page. 46 findings catalogued to /app/memory/demo_clarity_findings_agent.md.

ui_bugs.component: EstimateEditor.jsx / LpMaterialListPanel.jsx / AcceptPage.jsx / Customer Quote modal
ui_bugs.issue: SAME ESTIMATE shows four different totals: Editor LP material $11,055.71 vs Editor Summary $0.00 vs Customer Quote preview $24,005.01 vs Accept page $0.00. Root visible cause: sticky pill 'LP SMART - Derived, not yet applied'.
Every LP category collapsed header shows $0.00 while its expanded children have real prices ($7,034.73, $620.73, $1,901.83, $514.98 etc.).
Attestation reads 'I, letrick 7-14-26 7pm, accept this estimate for $0.00 as quoted by Pro-Quote Estimating Tool.' - estimate title used as customer name AND total is $0.00.
Personal note pre-seeded 'Hi letrick,' and 'Prepared for: letrick 7-14-26 7pm' - estimate title used as customer name in customer-facing PDF preview.

Appendage/chase edit rows (Depth/Height 'measure' rows for the chase) are NOT rendered inside the 3D BACK tab; they live under [data-testid=lp-field-verify-card] in the LP Material List panel. Demo viewer will click 3D BACK tab and not find them.

ui_bugs.component: AI Measure modal + Confirm openings + 3D 'This Wall Openings'
ui_bugs.issue: Opening counters disagree: '0/8 reviewed', '8 unconfirmed', ~10-12 physical from qty×lines, and per-wall 'Openings 4' for FRONT. No reconciliation line.
'PRICING PENDING' (editor) vs 'PRICING TO BE CONFIRMED' (quote preview) - two different labels for same state, on 11 line items (all gutter accessories + cap window + cap entry door + tear-off).
ui_bugs.selector: LP Seamless Gutter / Misc labor rows

ui_bugs.issue: Four+ names for same 'not-yet-ground-truthed' state: unconfirmed / derived / assumed / estimate / user-measured / AI-derived / AI-per-wall / AI-classified. Used inconsistently across LP field-verify card, 3D geometry panel, tape nudge card and AI Measure modal.
ui_bugs.selector: multiple: [data-testid=lp-field-verify-card], [data-testid=lp-tape-nudge-chase], [data-testid=lp-material-3d] geometry rows, AI Measure modal chips

ui_bugs.issue: 'LP SMART / Derived - not yet applied' is meaningful only to an insider - demo viewer will read as 'you forgot to click something'.
Empty ~50-60px vertical gap between 3D canvas and Share block on mobile with only the on-site verification footnote floating in it - reads like a broken/unloaded section.

Header shows generic 'Pro-Quote Estimating Tool / ESTIMATOR' mark; footer says 'MATERIALS SUPPLIED BY ALSIDE SUPPLY'. Two branding stories in one PDF preview. Accept page has neither the Alside logo nor a supplier co-brand line.
Panel title contains implementation note '(siding + opening trim mesh groups; corner/fascia meshes pending)' leaking into UI.
'1,781 ft² siding split' does not obviously reconcile with per-wall FRONT '430 sf' × 4 = 1,720 sf (61 sf gable delta not surfaced).
ui_bugs.selector: AI Measure modal preview header vs [data-testid=lp-material-3d] takeoff card

ui_bugs.issue: LP SmartSide Trim badge shows '2' but three trim lines exist in the material list.
ui_bugs.selector: pill next to LP SmartSide Trim accordion header

ui_bugs.issue: Heavy all-caps usage across every heading/label blurs hierarchy; 'BAKED INTO LINE QTY ON IMPORT' etc. reads as jargon.
'How this number was derived' caret + long product names ('540 Series OSC 5/4" x 4" x 16'') wrap and visually mis-align QTY column.
Every color chip has ⛔ glyph except Snowscape White; semantics of ⛔ never explained in the UI.
CONFIRM ACCEPTANCE button is disabled until checkbox ticked but no inline hint tells the customer why.

integration_issues.flow: LP-derived material -> Editor Summary -> Customer Quote total -> Accept page total
integration_issues.issue: Four totals derived from three separate paths, none of which agree with each other, all reachable from the same estimate within 2 clicks.
No 'Customer name' field on Job Information; downstream Personal Note ('Hi letrick,'), 'Prepared for:' line, and Accept-page attestation all fall back to the estimate title.
affected_selectors: Customer Quote modal Personal Note textarea

issues: 'Add email to send quotes' pill sits awkwardly in Job Information header at 1366x768
Header logo slot is empty (only text)
White gap between 3D and Share block reads as unloaded
3D-model image crops top of roof out of frame in the preview view

action_items: OWNER REVIEW: 46 findings held for Howard's review in /app/memory/demo_clarity_findings_agent.md - DO NOT fix without approval, this is an audit-only deliverable.
The demo-killer is Cross-screen HIGH: 4 totals disagree ($0 / $0 / $11,055.71 / $24,005.01) on one estimate. Priority to reconcile before Sept demo.
Second priority: attestation on Accept page says customer accepts for $0.00 with estimate-title as customer name - this is customer-facing.
Consolidate the ~7-way state vocabulary (unconfirmed/derived/assumed/estimate/user-measured/AI-derived/AI-per-wall/AI-classified) to two or three tiers.
critical_code_review_comments: State-machine leak: the sticky pill 'Derived - not yet applied' exposes an internal LP-derivation lifecycle to the end user. It should either auto-apply or be represented as an actionable button, not as ambient status.
Accordion category rollup showing $0.00 while children have prices is an easy fix (sum children) that would silence ~7 findings at once.
Customer name is not modelled as a separate field on the estimate - the fallback (estimate title) leaks into Personal Note greeting, Quote 'Prepared for', and Accept attestation.
Two independent totalization paths: Customer Quote modal derives its own total ($24,005.01) instead of reading from the editor Summary card - these should share one derivation.
AI Measure modal, Confirm-openings row, 3D per-wall takeoff, and LP field-verify card each show their own opening/verification counter without a shared, reconciled counter.
test_credentials: hhunt6677@yahoo.com / [REDACTED — backend/.env ADMIN_PASSWORD] (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) - login works via curl and Playwright (initial 401s on /api/auth/me before login are expected).
seed_data_creation: None. Estimate left as found; no data mutated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AUDIT-ONLY run - the deliverable is /app/memory/demo_clarity_findings_agent.md (46 findings, severity-tagged by screen). No code changes were made. If a future run applies fixes, re-verify by (1) opening estimate 8f95c9c2 and comparing LP material total, Summary 'Your Price to Homeowner', Customer Quote 'Total Price', and Accept page 'Total Price' - all four should reconcile. (2) Confirm attestation on /accept/preview-accept-3d no longer says '$0.00' and no longer uses the estimate title as customer name. (3) Confirm LP category accordions show non-zero rollups matching their children.
rca of the issue: Read-only audit; no bug to RCA. However the recurring root cause across most HIGH findings is that the LP-derived material list runs on a separate compute/state path from the estimate's legacy line-item pricing (evidenced by the 'Derived - not yet applied' banner). The Editor Summary + Accept page pull from the legacy path (both $0.00), the LP Material panel pulls from the LP derivation ($11,055.71), and the Customer Quote modal computes a THIRD total ($24,005.01) that rolls in waste, tax, labor and margin on the LP-derived quantities. Unifying these behind one derivation would resolve findings 1, 2, 3, 23, 30, 38 and 39 in one change.
